title: Season of Rebirth
description: A Kitchen Sink pack built around exploring the world of Modded Minecraft for Fabric 1.20.1.
body:
A kitchen sink pack built around showcasing new and old mods of Minecraft, containing simple and more complex mods for everyone to enjoy.

- Explore the world with Terralith, new and reimagined structures, Quests, and dimensions!
- Become a master of magic with Botania, Malum, and spellbooks!
- Build your arsenal with unique weapons, artifacts, trinkets, and Zenith!
- Grow and cook hundreds of new foods to share with friends!
- Tame dragons, taking to the skies!
- Automate large factories with Create, AE2, Industrial Revolution, or Modern Industrialization!
- Conquer the stars and build bases on other planets!
- Collect money and trade with villagers or your friends with Numismatic Overhaul!

Iris and shaders is included, providing Complementary Unbound + Euphoria patches.
6Gb of ram is recommended for this pack.


I do not take credit for any of the mods, all credit belongs to the mod authors.
